tracker_read: Run: `venv/Scripts/python.exe tools/tracker_sync.py read`. Uses ecosystem service account (GOOGLE_SHEETS_CREDS_PATH env var), no browser auth. If it errors with 'give Editor access', surface verbatim so the user can share the sheet with the service account email; do not retry blindly. Tracker URL for reference (auth-walled, do not WebFetch): https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1jWYuZMoj-3VnyywgbnIzmzrvjAgyne8spazrEOl4TM8/edit
tracker_log_commit: Run: `venv/Scripts/python.exe tools/tracker_sync.py log-commit --summary "{summary}" --in-progress "{in_progress}" --next-steps "{next_steps}"`. Appends a row (date | summary | in-progress | next steps) to the Session Log tab.

version_sync.source: Read the 'Current status' section in CLAUDE.md and extract the version number (e.g. v9.4 -> 9.4). Strip the 'v' prefix.
version_sync.target: version.txt at project root. This ensures notify_mothership.yml dispatches the correct version to ecosystem-core on push, which updates manifest.json and the Master Tracker spreadsheet automatically.
